# Flow: Pantry

Shelf view → consume → expiry → eat-first

## Diagram

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  Shelf[/inventory/location]
  Consume[One-tap consume]
  Expiry[Expiry badges]
  EatFirst[Home eat-first]
  Shelf --> Consume
  Shelf --> Expiry
  Expiry --> EatFirst
```
